title: tarenna aurantiaca
intro: Tarenna aurantiaca, also known as the Orange Tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub that grows in tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Tarenna aurantiaca can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
